judge_result.short_rationale: Includes unsupported cross-incident instructions for skin washing, mouth rinsing, and not inducing vomiting in an inhalation case. It also omits the required conditional 911/ambulance action if not breathing and does not match the required poison control center or doctor treatment-advice step.
